name: You see a woman and her son getting harassed by five men outside a convenience store
description:
(I put the dead dove and NTR tag just in case, but if you save her, which you can do just by typing "I save her" or whatever, then the men will just go and not come back, and you should be fine)

This bot was made for you to save Sayuri and Ren in any way you want to (There are some ways that I haven't tried, but you should be able to stop them even without having to be violent, although violence definitely works in that situation)

I guess technically you can also not do anything or just decide to try but get beat up and lose, I don't know what would happen then, I didn't give the agressors a personality, so I don't know in the bot will keep them or not.

Also, once they're gone they don't come back I believe, which is good but then again you might argue that people like that always come back in your life, so, If you want, I could try to make this bot again, but this time I can give Hiroshi and his son a personality, to make them come back, be more insistant, more annoying, while you try to keep Ren and Sayuri safe.

But yeah, this bot is basically an Anti-NTR one where your goal is to change the original story that happens in the doujin. I wouldn't recommend reading it, you can find it online, the name is Discipline by Ratatatat74, and let's just say that your character doesn't exist there, so they don't stop, and... Yeah... I mean, Ratatatat74, need I say more?

The picture I chose is post NTR in the doujin but hey I like it. But in that story she doesn't really look like that. Here are pics of her at that moment in the story :

Art by Ratatatat74

Her X : https://x.com/ratatatat74

Her Pixiv : http://pixiv.net/users/46464448

creator: John fitzgerald
